scripts.build:orchestrator: npx esbuild packages/orchestrator/src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=packages/orchestrator/dist/server.js
scripts.build:registry: npx esbuild packages/registry/src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=packages/registry/dist/server.js
scripts.build:oracle: npx esbuild packages/agents/stellar-oracle/src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=packages/agents/stellar-oracle/dist/server.js
scripts.build:webintel: npx esbuild packages/agents/web-intel/src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=packages/agents/web-intel/dist/server.js
scripts.build:webintel2: npx esbuild packages/agents/web-intel-v2/src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=packages/agents/web-intel-v2/dist/server.js
scripts.build:analysis: npx esbuild packages/agents/analysis/src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=packages/agents/analysis/dist/server.js
scripts.build:reporter: npx esbuild packages/agents/reporter/src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=packages/agents/reporter/dist/server.js
scripts.build: npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:registry && npm run build:orchestrator && npm run build:oracle && npm run build:webintel && npm run build:webintel2 && npm run build:analysis && npm run build:reporter
